title: Synthetic clinical scenarios (demo only — no real PHI)

scenarios.label: Discharge summary — plain-language handoff
scenarios.context:
DE-IDENTIFIED DISCHARGE NOTE
Age: 67 | Sex: F | MRN: REDACTED
Admission: uncomplicated pneumonia, treated with IV antibiotics.
Hospital course: improved oxygenation, ambulating independently.
Discharge meds: amoxicillin 7d, albuterol PRN.
Follow-up: PCP in 1 week.
scenarios.question: Write a 3-sentence plain-language summary for the patient and family.

Potassium: 5.8 mEq/L
